query:
-- 1. Criar lead de teste
INSERT INTO leads (nome, telefone, email, status, corretorId, projectId, origem, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('Cliente Teste Follow-up', '11999887766', 'teste@followup.com', 'em_atendimento', 6, 1, 'facebook', NOW(), NOW());

-- 2. Pegar ID do lead criado
SET @leadId = LAST_INSERT_ID();

-- 3. Criar follow-up para HOJE às 9h
INSERT INTO follow_ups (leadId, corretorId, dataFollowUp, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (@leadId, 6, CONCAT(CURDATE(), ' 09:00:00'), 'pendente', NOW(), NOW());

-- 4. Retornar resultado
SELECT 
  l.id as leadId,
  l.nome as leadNome,
  f.id as followUpId,
  f.dataFollowUp
FROM leads l
INNER JOIN follow_ups f ON l.id = f.leadId
WHERE l.id = @leadId;
